_meta.description: Log Search/Analysis System — Skill Registry Index

skills.name: es-query-builder
skills.description: Build Elasticsearch DSL queries from natural language descriptions

skills.name: loki-query-builder
skills.description: Build LogQL queries from natural language for Grafana Loki log retrieval

skills.name: time-range-parser
skills.description: Parse relative time expressions like "last hour", "yesterday", "last 7 days" into absolute timestamps

skills.name: result-formatter
skills.description: Format log query results as tables, JSON, or CSV with configurable output

skills.name: auth-checker
skills.description: Role-based access control for log data with SRE, Developer, and Security role tiers

skills.name: error-search
skills.description: Search error logs using Elasticsearch DSL with optional time range filtering

skills.name: trace-search
skills.description: Search distributed traces using Elasticsearch DSL with trace ID or service filters

skills.name: container-log-search
skills.description: Search container and pod logs using Loki LogQL with label-based filtering

skills.name: slow-query-search
skills.description: Detect and analyze slow database queries with performance metrics

skills.name: security-audit-search
skills.description: Search security audit logs with access control enforcement

skills.name: app-log-search
skills.description: Full-text search across application logs with structured field filtering

skills.name: metric-query
skills.description: Query time-series metrics from ClickHouse with time range and formatting

skills.name: log-aggregation
skills.description: Aggregate and group log entries using Elasticsearch bucket aggregations

skills.name: k8s-oom-alert
skills.description: Respond to Kubernetes OOMKilled pod alerts with error and slow query analysis

skills.name: disk-full-alert
skills.description: Respond to disk full alerts by analyzing container logs for space consumption

skills.name: spike-detection
skills.description: Detect and analyze traffic or error rate spikes using Elasticsearch aggregations

skills.name: error-rate-alert
skills.description: Evaluate error rate threshold violations using error logs and metrics

skills.name: latency-alert
skills.description: Evaluate latency threshold violations using metric time-series data

skills.name: cert-expiry-alert
skills.description: Respond to TLS certificate expiry warnings with renewal guidance

skills.name: rca-pipeline
skills.description: Multi-step root cause analysis combining error search, trace search, and spike detection

skills.name: capacity-forecast
skills.description: Forecast resource capacity needs based on slow query trends and usage metrics

skills.name: alert-correlation
skills.description: Correlate multiple alerts to identify common root causes and alert storms

skills.name: incident-report
skills.description: Generate structured incident reports with formatted timeline and action items

skills.name: sre-overview
skills.description: SRE overview dashboard with optional metric queries and error rate alerts

skills.name: error-budget
skills.description: Error budget dashboard tracking SLO compliance with metric queries and formatted output
